title: A malaria vaccine and methods for producing same
abstract: The present description relates to malaria vaccines comprising Plasmodium falciparum (Pf) polypeptide complexes and methods of producing the same. The Pf polypeptides in complexes or in a partially complexed arrangement may comprise two or more of the following polypeptides: PfRipr, PfCyrPa and PfRh5. Drosophila cells and expression vectors are also described.
claims:
Claims Claims: 1. A Drosophila derived cell modified to express a Plasmodium falciparum (Pf) Ripr polypeptide from a heterologous polynucleotide encoding a PfRipr polypeptide and a suitable signal sequence, wherein the polynucleotide is operably linked to an expression control sequence which induces PfRipr polypeptide expression in the cell and wherein the PfRipr polypeptide from said cell induces merozoite invasion inhibitory antibodies when administered to a subject. 2. The cell of claim 1 further comprising a heterologous polynucleotide encoding PfRh5 polypeptide and a suitable signal sequence, operably linked to an expression control sequence which induces PfRh5 polypeptide expression in the cell wherein co-expression of PfRipr and PfRh5 polypeptides in the cell induces increased yields of either or both polypeptides compared to mono-expression of either polypeptide. 3. The cell of claim 1 or 2, further comprising a heterologous polynucleotide encoding a PfCyrPa polypeptide and a suitable signal sequence, operably linked to an expression control sequence which induces PfCyrPa polypeptide expression in the cell. 4. The cell of claim 1 or 2 or 3, further comprising a heterologous polynucleotide encoding a PfEÎA175 polypeptide and a suitable signal sequence, operably linked to a promoter which induces EBA17S polypeptide expression in the cell. 5. A Drosophila derived cell modified to express a Plasmodium falciparum (Pf) Ripr polypeptide, a PfRh5 polypeptide and a PfCyrPa polypeptide from a heterologous polynucleotide encoding a PfRipr polypeptide and a suitable signal sequence operably linked to a promoter which induces PfRipr polypeptide expression, a PfRh5 polypeptide and a suitable signal sequence operably linked to a promoter which induces PfRh5 polypeptide expression and a PfCyrPa polypeptide and a suitable signal sequence operably linked to a promoter which induces PfCyrPa polypeptide expression in a Drosophila derived cell wherein the PfRipr polypeptide, PfRh5 polypeptide and PfCyrPa polypeptide from said cell induce parasite invasion inhibitory antibodies when administered to a subject. 6. An expression vector comprising a polynucleotide encoding PfRipr polypeptide and a suitable signal sequence, said polynucleotide operably linked to an expression control sequence which induces PfRipr polypeptide expression in a Drosophila derived cell, wherein the PfRipr 

 polypeptide from said cell induces parasite growth inhibitory antibodies when administered to a subject. 7. An expression vector comprising, a polynucleotide encoding a PfRh5 polypeptide and a suitable signal sequence, said polynucleotide operably linked to a promoter which induces high level of PfRh5 polypeptide expression in a Drosophila cell culture wherein the PfRh5 polypeptide from said cell induces parasite growth inhibitory antibodies when administered to a subject. 8. An expression vector comprising, a polynucleotide encoding a PfCyrPa polypeptide and a suitable signal sequence, said polynucleotide operably linked to an expression control sequence which induces PfCyrPa polypeptide expression in a Drosophila derived cell, wherein the PfCyrPa polypeptide from said cell induces parasite growth inhibitory antibodies when administered to a subject. 9. A Drosophila cell comprising one, two or three vectors selected from a vector of claim 6, 7 and 8. 10. A Pf polypeptide or Pf protein complex or Pf protein mixture purified from the cell of claim 1, 2, 3, 4, or S or another expression host cell expressing a vector as described herein. 11. A purifiedPf protein complex or protein mixture wherein the complex or mixture comprises a PfRipr polypeptide, a PfRh5 polypeptide and PfCyrPa polypeptide, and wherein the purified Pf protein complex or mixture induces merozoite invasion inhibitory antibodies when administered to a subject. 12. An immunogenic composition comprising thePf polypeptide, complex or mixture of claim 10 or 11 and a physiologically or pharmaceutically acceptable carrier, diluent or excipient. 13. The immunogenic composition of claim 12 further comprising an adjuvant. 14. The immunogenic composition of claim 12 further comprising thePf polypeptide, complex or mixture presented on a virus-like particle or virosome. 15. A method of producing Plasmodium falciparum (Pf) Ripr polypeptide comprising transfecting a Drosophila derived cell with a vector of claim S and isolating PfRipr from said cells. 16. A method of producing an immune response in a subject, the method comprising a administering to the subject an effective amount of the immunogenic composition of claim 12 or 13 or 14. 17. A method of treating or preventing malaria caused by P. falciparum in a subject, the method comprising administering to the subject an effective amount of the immunogenic composition of claim 12 or 13 or 14. 18. The method of claim 16 or claim 17, wherein the subject is human. 19. An immunogenic composition comprising the Pf polypeptide or Pf protein complex or Pf protein mixture of claim 10 or claim 11 for use in the treatment and/or prophylaxis of P. falciparum malaria. 20. An immunogenic composition comprising the Pf polypeptide or Pf protein complex or Pf protein mixture of claim 10 or claim 11 for use in the manufacture of a medicament for the treatment or prophylaxis of P. falciparum malaria. 21. A kit for detecting an immune response, the kit comprising: (i) a Pf protein complex or Pf protein mixture of claim 10 or claim 11 and (ii) one or more antigen and/or antibody detection reagents. 22. An isolated antibody that specifically recognizes the Pf protein complex or an epitope in thePf protein mixture of claim 10 or claim 11. 23. A kit for detecting if a subject has a P. falciparum infection, the kit comprising: (i) an antibody that specifically binds to the Pf protein complex or an epitope in the Pf protein mixture of claim 10 or claim 11, and (ii) one or more antigen and/or antibody detection reagents. 24 The steps, features, integers, compositions and/or compounds disclosed herein or indicated in the specification of this application individually or collectively, and any and all combinations of two of more of said steps or features.
